microPractice.description: Keyed by videoId. Every key must exist in curriculum.json under this unit (validator-enforced). Target size: 5 items per video (validator warning, not an error).

unitMastery.description: Canonically owned by unitNumber — never keyed by unit title. The web compiler emits the legacy title-keyed QUIZ_DATA.unit_mastery shape until the router migration. Target size: 30 items (validator warning).

retiredIds.description: IDs burned by retired items. An ID here may never reappear in microPractice or unitMastery (validator-enforced).
